name: bm25s (Fast BM25 Retrieval)

performance.notes: 500x faster than rank-bm25; NumPy/SciPy sparse arrays; 5M docs indexed in <5s

agent_readiness.notes: Ultra-fast BM25 implementation using NumPy/SciPy sparse arrays. 500x faster than rank-bm25 on large corpora. BM25, BM25L, BM25+, BM25-Adpt variants. Simple 3-step API: tokenize, index, retrieve. Saves/loads indices. Ideal for RAG pipelines needing fast lexical search without Elasticsearch. Complements dense vector search for hybrid retrieval. Pure Python — no external dependencies besides NumPy.

gotchas: Keyword search only — no semantic understanding (pair with embeddings for hybrid)
In-memory only — large corpora require significant RAM
best_when: Fast BM25 lexical search in Python RAG pipelines
When Elasticsearch is overkill for moderate-size corpora
avoid_when: Very large corpora (100M+ docs — use Elasticsearch)
Production search requiring persistence and sharding
summary: bm25s is an ultra-fast BM25 implementation (500x faster than rank-bm25) using NumPy/SciPy sparse arrays. BM25, BM25+, BM25L variants. Simple index-and-retrieve API. Essential for RAG pipelines needing fast lexical search without Elasticsearch overhead. Best paired with dense vector search for hybrid retrieval. Pure Python with NumPy dependency only.
